summary: Among the largest animals to walk Isla Nublar. InGen's Brachiosaurus stock was used for gentle-herbivore baseline studies and public-facing habitat displays.
facts: Forelimbs longer than hindlimbs — distinctive high-shouldered profile.
Likely fed from upper canopy; minimal competition with low browsers.
Vocalizations recorded in the 10–20 Hz range; felt as much as heard.
Embryo viability among the highest in InGen's sauropod line.
fieldNotes: Maintain wide clearance zones. Specimen shows calm disposition when visual contact is maintained.
